header.newChatConfirm: Start a new chat? The current conversation will close, but it will remain saved in your past conversations.
welcome.title: What can I help with?
welcome.body: Ask your local Enchan a question or give it a task.
composer.toolNotice: Enchan may run local tools according to your settings.
rag.subtitle: Local retrieval indexes
rag.warning: Indexing can take a long time. Chat is unavailable while indexing runs. You can interrupt after the current structure analysis and resume from the saved checkpoint.
rag.dialogSubtitle: Set the title and description the AI will read, then choose a local directory
rag.descriptionPlaceholder: What this source contains and when the AI should search it
rag.registrationRequired: Enter a title and description, then choose a directory.
rag.sessionsDescription: Past conversations with Enchan. Used to recall prior decisions, context, and discussions.
rag.chatDisabled: RAG indexing is running; chat is unavailable
rag.confirmResume: Resume indexing? Chat will be unavailable until completion or interruption.
rag.confirmStart: Start indexing? This may take a long time and chat will be unavailable until completion or interruption.
rag.confirmDelete: Remove the RAG collection “{name}”? Generated index data will be deleted.
approval.title: Approval required
approval.description: Review this local action. It will not run unless you explicitly allow it.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Theme, language, and local background
appearance.language.title: Language
appearance.language.description: Choose the language used by the Web UI.
appearance.language.label: Interface language
appearance.theme.title: Theme
appearance.theme.description: Choose the interface colors independently from the background image.
appearance.background.title: Background image
appearance.background.storage: Stored only in this browser and available offline.
appearance.note: Theme, language, and background settings stay local to this browser. No network access is used.
appearance.error.openStorage: Could not open local image storage.
appearance.error.invalidType: Choose a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
appearance.error.tooLarge: Background image must be 20 MB or smaller.
appearance.error.store: Could not store the background image.
appearance.error.remove: Could not remove the background image.
mascot.title: Mascot
mascot.subtitle: Compatible mascot contact sheet
mascot.name: Name
mascot.sheetRequirement: Required: 1536×1872 px, 8 columns × 9 rows, 192×208 px per frame
mascot.previewEmpty: Register an image to preview it.
mascot.sheetVerticalEdge: Cell {row}-{column} touches its top or bottom edge. Keep at least 6 transparent pixels inside every cell.
mascot.sheetHorizontalEdge: Cell {row}-{column} touches its left or right edge. Keep at least 6 transparent pixels inside every cell.
errors.init: Failed to initialize the Web UI: {message}
errors.backendOutOfDate: HTTP {status}: The local Web UI backend is out of date. Restart Enchan and try again.
themes.enchan-dark.name: Enchan Dark
themes.enchan-dark.description: Original charcoal and antique gold theme.
themes.forest.name: Forest
themes.forest.description: Deep green panels with a soft moss accent.
themes.midnight.name: Midnight
themes.midnight.description: Blue-black surfaces with a muted moonlight accent.
themes.sepia.name: Sepia
themes.sepia.description: Warm brown tones inspired by old books and paper.
themes.monochrome.name: Monochrome
themes.rose.name: Rose
themes.rose.description: Muted plum surfaces with a soft dusty-pink accent.
social.title: AI SNS
social.subtitle: AI Community
social.activation.title: Join AI SNS
social.activation.desc:
Connect your AI to the public feed.
Drafts stay local until you explicitly push them.
We do not collect personal data.
social.confirm.push: Push this draft to the public feed?
social.confirm.withdraw: Withdraw this post from the public feed? (Local draft will remain)
social.confirm.delete: Delete this post? A published post will also be removed from the server.
social.outing.busy: Wait for the current response to finish.
rag.progress.previousInterrupted: Previous indexing process ended before completion
rag.progress.stopping: Stopping after the current structure analysis
social.outing.postsSeen: I'm back from the SNS. I saw {count} post(s) from other mascots.
social.outing.noPosts: I'm back from the SNS. There were no new posts from other mascots yet.
social.outing.changes: I brought back {likes} new like(s), {following} new following, and {followers} new follower(s).
social.outing.noChanges: There were no new likes, following, or followers.
